title: A2Z 4 KIDS 3 in 1 Loop & Launch Track Set with 6 Alloy Die Cast Cars Vehicle Display Stand Holds 28 Cars Twin Launcher & Loop Track Carry Case Playset for Boys & Girls Age 3+
features: 3-IN-1 DESIGN FOR ENDLESS FUN: This exciting loop and launch set transforms into three play modes a vehicle launcher with dual ramps, a gravity-defying loop track, and a vertical car display that stores up to 28 racers.

INCLUDES 6 DIE-CAST CARS: The set comes complete with 6 vibrant alloy racing cars built for speed and durability. Each vehicle is die-cast with detailed features, perfect for fast action play and imaginative racing fun.

PORTABLE STORAGE AND DISPLAY STAND: The sturdy carry case doubles as a multi-tiered display stand to keep toy cars neatly organised. Easily folds for portability, making it great for on-the-go fun or tidy bedroom storage.

EASY TO ASSEMBLE AND PLAY: Quick to set up with snap-fit components designed for young children. Kids can create their track setups, promoting creativity, problem-solving and independent building skills.

SAFE, EDUCATIONAL & AGE APPROPRIATE: Crafted for children aged 3 and up using safe, child-friendly materials. Encourages STEM learning through motion, force and gravity, all while enhancing hand-eye coordination and motor skills.
